---
title: "LRP157: GP knee-test — expressive vocabulary (E) -> word reading (W)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRP157 is a **GP knee-test**: a nonparametric (**HSGP**) re-attempt of the LRP57 mechanism, built
to test whether the expressive-vocabulary -> word-reading association has a **"knee"** the way
[LRP58](../lrp-rli-mech-058) found for letter sounds.

LRP57 was forced to a **linear** mechanism because the HSGP curve diverged (~200 divergences,
unmoved by `target_accept` 0.99), so its estimand is a single slope, not a shape. This variant
switches the HSGP curve **back on** and lifts `target_accept` to **0.999** (per LRP58) so the curve
gets a genuine chance to converge.

_Non-convergence is itself the result._ A persisting divergence at `target_accept` 0.999 is itself the honest result and leaves the knee
untestable for this exposure — check the gate badge above before reading any shape into the curve.

## Adjustment set

Revised DAG (2026-07-10), re-derived by a backdoor d-separation search with the latent general
ability ($GA$) held: $E$'s observed confounders that also reach word reading are
$\{A, HS, R, RW, SP, TE, TR\}$; group $G\,(= IG)$ is the always-in precision term and
$W_{\text{pre}}$ the autoregressive baseline. This is **identical to LRP57** — only the mechanism's
functional form (nonparametric curve vs single slope) changes.

_Adjusted association, not causal._ Residual confounding by latent general ability ($GA$) remains, so $f^E$ is an **adjusted
association**, not a causal effect. The randomised causal claim lives in the ITT suite.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_results_mechanism.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
